title: Operations Admin Executive
description:
Key Responsibilities

Operations & Order Coordination

·      Process purchase orders and operational requests accurately and promptly.

·      Coordinate with vendors on pricing, availability, and delivery schedules.

·      Track order status and follow up with suppliers to ensure timely delivery.

·      Liaise with internal teams to arrange deliveries and support project timelines.

·      Follow up with relevant teams to ensure Goods Receipt (GRN) is completed on time.

Vendor & External Coordination

·      Communicate with suppliers on quotations, confirmations, delivery dates, and documentation.

·      Support sourcing activities by obtaining quotations and assisting in price comparisons when required.

·      Maintain good working relationships with vendors to support operational needs.

Documentation & Administrative Support

·      Prepare and maintain operational records including quotations, purchase orders, delivery orders, invoices, and GRN.

·      Ensure documentation is properly filed and aligned with internal processes.

·      Assist with invoice verification and submission for processing.

Internal Coordination & Operational Support

·      Work closely with Sales, Presales, Engineers, Project, and Finance teams to support daily operations.

·      Monitor operational timelines and follow up with stakeholders to prevent delays.

·      Support inventory-related coordination and aging control.

General Operations Support

·      Provide administrative and operational assistance across departments as required.

·      Support process improvements and standardisation of operational workflows.

·      Perform any other operational or administrative duties assigned by management.

Requirements

·      Diploma or higher in Business Administration, Operations, Supply Chain, or related field.

·      Minimum 1–3 years’ experience in operations or administrative roles (IT / system integrator environment is an advantage).

·      Comfortable coordinating with multiple internal teams and external vendors.

·      Strong organisational skills with attention to detail.

·      Able to manage multiple tasks and follow up proactively.

·      Proficient in Microsoft Office (especially Excel).

·      Positive attitude, adaptable, and willing to support across operational functions.

postedCompany.description: Vision of CHASSasia is to innovate and simplify technology for a great customer experience. Our mission is to provide information technology solutions and services for business by providing seamless support with outstanding service through a strong focus on people development, offering stakeholders the best returns. CHASSasia is a premier IT service provider, with the key business involvement in technology consulting, project management, service deployment, IT maintenance support and licensing audit. CHASSasia is one of the Microsoft Large Account Reseller, and also a Certified Licensing Audit House.
postedCompany.name: CHASSASIA (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
